children.heading: Agreements to establish and operate fund authorized
children.label: a Agreements to establish and operate fund authorized
children.text: The Secretary is authorized to enter into an agreement for the establishment and operation of a student loan fund in accordance with this part with any public or nonprofit private school of nursing which is located in a State.
provide for establishment of a student loan fund by the school;

provide for deposit in the fund, except as provided in , of (A) the Federal capital contributions paid from allotments under to the school by the Secretary, (B) an additional amount from other sources equal to not less than one-ninth of such Federal capital contributions, (C) collections of principal and interest on loans made from the fund, (D) collections pursuant to , and (E) any other earnings of the fund;section 298d of this titlesection 297d of this titlesection 297b(f) of this title

provide that the fund, except as provided in , shall be used only for loans to students of the school in accordance with the agreement and for costs of collection of such loans and interest thereon;section 298d of this title

provide that loans may be made from such fund only to students pursuing a full-time or half-time course of study at the school leading to a baccalaureate or associate degree in nursing or an equivalent degree or a diploma in nursing, or to a graduate degree in nursing; and
contain such other provisions as are necessary to protect the financial interests of the United States.

children.heading: Regulatory standards applicable to collection of loans
children.label: c Regulatory standards applicable to collection of loans

children.text: Any standard established by the Secretary by regulation for the collection by schools of nursing of loans made pursuant to loan agreements under this part shall provide that the failure of any such school to collect such loans shall be measured in accordance with this subsection. With respect to the student loan fund established pursuant to such agreements, this subsection may not be construed to require such schools to reimburse such loan fund for loans that became uncollectable prior to 1983.

The measurement of a school’s failure to collect loans made under this part shall be the ratio (stated as a percentage) that the defaulted principal amount outstanding of such school bears to the matured loans of such school.

children.label: i
children.text: make an installment payment when due; or

children.label: ii
children.text: comply with any other term of the promissory note for such loan,

children.label: i
children.text: repayable monthly and in default for at least 120 days; and

children.label: ii
children.text: repayable less frequently than monthly and in default for at least 180 days;

children.label: C
children.text: the term “grace period” means the period of nine months beginning on the date on which the borrower ceases to pursue a full-time or half-time course of study at a school of nursing; and

children.label: i
children.text: enrolled in a full-time or half-time course of study at such school; or
